title: bidens segetum var. silvatica
intro: Bidens segetum var. silvatica, also known as the woodland beggar lice, is a variety of the Bidens segetum plant species, which is a type of flowering plant in the dandelion family. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which have been traditionally used to treat various health conditions. The plant is said to have several health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving digestive issues, and treating skin conditions such as eczema and acne. Bidens segetum var. silvatica can be prepared into herbal remedies, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
